    12→type SqrcCourseRepository struct {
    13→	sqrc db.Querier
    14→}
    15→
    16→func NewSqrcCourseRepository(q db.Querier) *SqrcCourseRepository {
    17→	return &SqrcCourseRepository{sqrc: q}
    18→}
    19→
    20→func (repository *SqrcCourseRepository) getCourseByCourseId(ctx context.Context, courseId string) (Course, error) {
    21→	var courseIdUuid pgtype.UUID
    22→
    23→	if err := courseIdUuid.Scan(courseId); err != nil {
    24→		return Course{}, err
    25→	}
    26→
    27→	courseRaw, err := repository.sqrc.GetCourseById(ctx, courseIdUuid)
    28→	if err != nil {
    29→		return Course{}, err
    30→	}
    31→
    32→	return toCourse(courseRaw), nil
    33→}
    34→
    35→func toCourse(raw db.GetCourseByIdRow) Course {
    36→	var tags []string
    37→	json.Unmarshal(raw.Tags, &tags)
    38→
    39→	type topicRaw struct {
    40→		CourseSectionTopicId string `json:"course_section_topic_id"`
    41→		Title                string `json:"title"`
    42→		Description          string `json:"description"`
    43→		Prerequisites        string `json:"prerequisites"`
    44→		Knowledge            string `json:"knowledge"`
    45→		Flow                 string `json:"flow"`
    46→		Quiz                 string `json:"quiz"`
    47→		CompletionCriteria   string `json:"completion_criteria"`
    48→	}
    49→	type sectionRaw struct {
    50→		CourseSectionId string     `json:"course_section_id"`
    51→		Title           string     `json:"title"`
    52→		Description     string     `json:"description"`
    53→		Topics          []topicRaw `json:"topics"`
    54→	}
    55→
    56→	var sectionsRaw []sectionRaw
    57→	json.Unmarshal(raw.Sections, &sectionsRaw)
    58→
    59→	sections := make([]Section, len(sectionsRaw))
    60→	for i, s := range sectionsRaw {
    61→		topics := make([]Topic, len(s.Topics))
    62→		for j, t := range s.Topics {
    63→			topics[j] = Topic{
    64→				topicId:            t.CourseSectionTopicId,
    65→				title:              t.Title,
    66→				description:        t.Description,
    67→				prerequisites:      t.Prerequisites,
    68→				knowledge:          t.Knowledge,
    69→				flow:               t.Flow,
    70→				quiz:               t.Quiz,
    71→				completionCriteria: t.CompletionCriteria,
    72→				number:             j,
    73→			}
    74→		}
    75→		sections[i] = Section{
    76→			sectionId:   s.CourseSectionId,
    77→			title:       s.Title,
    78→			description: s.Description,
    79→			number:      i,
    80→			topics:      topics,
    81→		}
    82→	}
    83→
    84→	var publishedAt *string
    85→	if raw.PublishedAt.Valid {
    86→		t := raw.PublishedAt.Time.Format(time.RFC3339)
    87→		publishedAt = &t
    88→	}
    89→
    90→	return Course{
    91→		courseId:      raw.CourseID.String(),
    92→		title:         raw.Title,
    93→		description:   raw.Description,
    94→		slug:          raw.Slug,
    95→		tags:          tags,
    96→		publishStatus: raw.PublishStatus,
    97→		category: Category{
    98→			categoryId: raw.CategoryID.String(),
    99→			name:       raw.CategoryName,
   100→		},
   101→		publishedAt: publishedAt,
   102→		author: Author{

   104→			name:     raw.AuthorName,
   105→		},
   106→		visibility: raw.Visibility,

    14→        OR course_id > @Cursor
    15→    )
    16→    AND (

    18→        OR title LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'

    26→-- name: GetCourseById :one
    27→SELECT
    28→    courses.course_id,
    29→    courses.title,
    30→    courses.description,
    31→    courses.slug,
    32→    courses.tags,
    33→    courses.publish_status,
    34→    courses.category_id,
    35→    categories.name AS category_name,
    36→    courses.published_at,
    37→    courses.author_id,
    38→    authors.name AS author_name,
    39→    courses.visibility,
    40→    json_agg(
    41→        json_build_object(
    42→            'course_section_id',
    43→            sections.course_section_id,
    44→            'title',
    45→            sections.title,
    46→            'description',
    47→            sections.description,
    48→            'topics',
    49→            sections.topics
    50→        )
    51→        ORDER BY
    52→            sections."index" ASC
    53→    ) AS sections
    54→FROM
    55→    courses
    56→    JOIN categories USING (category_id)
    57→    JOIN authors USING (author_id)
    58→    JOIN (
    59→        SELECT
    60→            course_sections.course_id,
    61→            course_sections.course_section_id,
    62→            course_sections.title,
    63→            course_sections.description,
    64→            course_sections."index",
    65→            json_agg(
    66→                json_build_object(
    67→                    'course_section_topic_id',
    68→                    course_section_topic_id,
    69→                    'title',
    70→                    course_section_topics.title,
    71→                    'description',
    72→                    course_section_topics.description,
    73→                    'prerequisites',
    74→                    course_section_topics.prerequisites,
    75→                    'knowledge',
    76→                    course_section_topics.knowledge,
    77→                    'flow',
    78→                    course_section_topics.flow,
    79→                    'quiz',
    80→                    course_section_topics.quiz,
    81→                    'completion_criteria',
    82→                    course_section_topics.completion_criteria
    83→                )
    84→                ORDER BY
    85→                    course_section_topics."index" ASC
    86→            ) AS topics
    87→        FROM
    88→            course_sections
    89→            JOIN course_section_topics USING (course_section_id)
    90→        GROUP BY
    91→            course_sections.course_id,
    92→            course_sections.course_section_id
    93→    ) AS sections USING (course_id)
    94→WHERE
    95→    courses.course_id = @CourseId :: uuid
    96→GROUP BY
    97→    courses.course_id,
    98→    courses.title,
    99→    courses.description,
   100→    courses.slug,
   101→    courses.tags,
   102→    courses.publish_status,
   103→    courses.category_id,

   105→    courses.published_at,

   108→    courses.visibility;

   110→-- name: GetProgressByUserIdAndCourseId :many
   111→SELECT
   112→    user_topic_progress_id,
   113→    utp.course_id,
   114→    utp.course_section_id,
   115→    utp.course_section_topic_id,
   116→    user_id,
   117→    status,
   118→    cs."index" AS section_index,
   119→    cst."index" AS topic_index
   120→FROM
   121→    user_topic_progresses utp
   122→    JOIN course_sections cs ON utp.course_section_id = cs.course_section_id
   123→    JOIN course_section_topics cst ON utp.course_section_topic_id = cst.course_section_topic_id
   124→WHERE
   125→    user_id = @UserId :: uuid
   126→    AND utp.course_id = @CourseId :: uuid;
   127→
   128→-- name: UpsertProgress :exec
   129→INSERT INTO
   130→    user_topic_progresses (
   131→        user_topic_progress_id,
   132→        course_id,
   133→        course_section_id,
   134→        course_section_topic_id,
   135→        user_id,
   136→        status
   137→    )
   138→VALUES
   139→    (
   140→        @UserTopicProgressId :: uuid,
   141→        @CourseId :: uuid,
   142→        @CourseSectionId :: uuid,
   143→        @CourseSectionTopicId :: uuid,
   144→        @UserId :: uuid,
   145→        @Status
   146→    )
   147→ON CONFLICT (course_section_topic_id, user_id)
   148→DO UPDATE SET
   149→    status = EXCLUDED.status;

すべてのファイルを詳しく調べました。以下が詳細な報告です。

## 詳細調査報告

### 1. マイグレーションファイル

#### **000001_add_courses.up.sql** - 初期スキーマ作成
- **categories テーブル**: ltree型のpath、メタカラム(_created_at, _updated_at)
- **authors テーブル**: author_id, name, profile
- **courses テーブル**: 
  - course_id (UUID), title, description, slug, tags (JSONB)
  - publish_status (draft/published/archived), visibility (private/public/paid)
  - category_id, author_id への外部キー
- **users テーブル**: user_id, nickname
- **apikeys テーブル**: key_hash, user_id, plain_suffix, expired_at
- **course_sections テーブル**: course_section_id, course_id, index (SMALLINT)
- **course_section_topics テーブル**: course_section_topic_id, course_id, course_section_id, index
- **user_topic_progresses テーブル**: 
  - 複合主キー: (course_section_topic_id, user_id)
  - course_id, course_section_id, course_section_topic_id, user_id
  - status TEXT (IN_PROGRESS / COMPLETED)
  - メタカラム(_created_at, _updated_at)
  - 各テーブルへの外部キー制約

#### **000002_enroll.down.sql** - ユーザーテーブル関連（DOWN文のみ）

#### **000003_course_complement.up.sql** - スキーマ拡張
- course_sections に title, description を追加
- course_section_topics に以下のカラムを追加:
  - title, description, prerequisites, knowledge, flow, quiz, completion_criteria
- **user_topic_progresses の重要な変更**:
  - user_topic_progress_id (UUID) カラムを追加
  - 主キーを (course_section_topic_id, user_id) から user_topic_progress_id に変更
  - UNIQUE制約: (course_section_topic_id, user_id) を追加

### 2. SQLクエリファイル (/apps/api/queries/courses.sql)

#### **GetCourseById** - コース詳細取得
JSONの集約でセクション・トピック情報を JSON 形式で取得。返り値に以下を含む:
- GetCourseByIdRow: CourseID, Title, Description, Slug, Tags, PublishStatus, CategoryID/Name, PublishedAt, AuthorID/Name, Visibility, Sections (JSON)

#### **GetProgressByUserIdAndCourseId** - ユーザーの進捗取得
```sql
SELECT user_topic_progress_id, course_id, course_section_id, course_section_topic_id, 
       user_id, status, section_index, topic_index
FROM user_topic_progresses utp
JOIN course_sections cs ON utp.course_section_id = cs.course_section_id
JOIN course_section_topics cst ON utp.course_section_topic_id = cst.course_section_topic_id
WHERE user_id = @UserId AND utp.course_id = @CourseId
```

#### **UpsertProgress** - 進捗の追加/更新
- INSERT または UPDATE (ON CONFLICT)
- パラメータ: user_topic_progress_id, course_id, course_section_id, course_section_topic_id, user_id, status
- 競合キー: (course_section_topic_id, user_id)

### 3. Goの構造体 (/apps/api/internal/db/models.go)

```go
type UserTopicProgress struct {
    CourseID             pgtype.UUID        // コースID
    CourseSectionID      pgtype.UUID        // セクションID
    CourseSectionTopicID pgtype.UUID        // トピックID
    UserID               pgtype.UUID        // ユーザーID
    Status               string             // IN_PROGRESS / COMPLETED
    CreatedAt            pgtype.Timestamptz
    UpdatedAt            pgtype.Timestamptz
    UserTopicProgressID  pgtype.UUID        // 進捗レコード自体のID
}
```

### 4. リポジトリレイヤー

#### **SqrcUserTopicProgressRepository** (/apps/api/routes/courses/commands/user_topic_progress.sqrc-repository.go)

**getProgress()** メソッド:
- GetProgressByUserIdAndCourseId クエリを実行
- GetProgressByUserIdAndCourseIdRow から ProgressRecord スライスに変換
- SectionIndex, TopicIndex を取得

**save()** メソッド:
- Progress オブジェクト内の各 ProgressRecord に対して UpsertProgress を実行
- ProgressRecord に userTopicProgressId がない場合は generateUUID() で生成
- すべての ID (course_id, section_id, topic_id, user_id) を pgtype.UUID に変換

### 5. ドメインモデル (/apps/api/routes/courses/commands/course.entity.go)

```go
type ProgressRecord struct {
    userTopicProgressId  string
    courseSectionId      string
    courseSectionTopicId string
    sectionNumber        int      // course_sections の index
    topicNumber          int      // course_section_topics の index
    status               string   // "IN_PROGRESS" / "COMPLETED"
    startedAt            string   // RFC3339 形式
    completedAt          *string  // ポインタ（オプション）
}

type Progress struct {
    courseId string
    userId   string
    records  []ProgressRecord
}
```

**重要なメソッド**:
- `Progress.lastTopicPosition()`: 最後に受講/完了したトピックの位置を取得
- `Progress.start(section, topic)`: 新しい ProgressRecord を追加 (IN_PROGRESS ステータス)

### 6. 主要な処理フロー (Usecase)

**EnrollCourseUsecase.execute()**:
1. コース情報と現在の進捗を並列取得 (errgroup)
2. `course.checkEnrollable()`: publish_status と visibility を確認
3. `course.findTopicToStart()`: 開始すべきトピックを決定
   - sectionNumber/topicNumber が指定された場合はそれを使用
   - 未指定の場合は lastTopicPosition を参照:
     - COMPLETED → 次のトピックへ
     - IN_PROGRESS → 同じトピックへ
     - NOT_STARTED → 最初のトピック (0, 0)
4. `progress.start()`: 新しい ProgressRecord を追加
5. `progressRepository.save()`: DB に UpsertProgress で保存

### 7. テスト (/apps/api/routes/courses/commands/)

**enroll.handler.medium.server_test.go** - DB統合テスト:
- sectionNumber/topicNumber の指定パターン
- 異なるステータスでの遷移 (COMPLETED → 次へ、IN_PROGRESS → 継続)
- 複数セクション・トピックの遷移
- Draft コース (作成者のみアクセス可)
- トピック指定なしで自動計算される動作

### 重要な設計点

1. **非正規化**: user_topic_progresses に course_id, course_section_id を冗長で保持（クエリ効率のため）
2. **複合主キーの変更**: マイグレーション 003 で (topic_id, user_id) → user_topic_progress_id に変更
3. **ステータス管理**: IN_PROGRESS / COMPLETED のみ。未開始はレコード自体がない
4. **Usecase と Repository**: インターフェース経由で依存関係を注入
5. **UUID生成**: アプリケーション側で生成（DB側では使用せず）

これらのファイルは、ユーザーのコース受講進捗を追跡するための主要なコンポーネントを構成しています。

-- name: GetCourses :many
SELECT
    course_id,
    title
FROM
    courses
WHERE
    (
        courses.publish_status = 'published'
        AND courses.visibility IN ('public', 'paid')
    )
    AND (
        @Cursor :: uuid IS NULL
        OR course_id > @Cursor
    )
    AND (
        NULLIF(@Keyword :: text, '') IS NULL
        OR title LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
        OR description LIKE '%' || @Keyword || '%'
    )
ORDER BY
    course_id
LIMIT
    @Size;

-- name: GetCourseById :one
SELECT
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    categories.name AS category_name,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    authors.name AS author_name,
    courses.visibility,
    json_agg(
        json_build_object(
            'course_section_id',
            sections.course_section_id,
            'title',
            sections.title,
            'description',
            sections.description,
            'topics',
            sections.topics
        )
        ORDER BY
            sections."index" ASC
    ) AS sections
FROM
    courses
    JOIN categories USING (category_id)
    JOIN authors USING (author_id)
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_sections.course_section_id,
            course_sections.title,
            course_sections.description,
            course_sections."index",
            json_agg(
                json_build_object(
                    'course_section_topic_id',
                    course_section_topic_id,
                    'title',
                    course_section_topics.title,
                    'description',
                    course_section_topics.description,
                    'prerequisites',
                    course_section_topics.prerequisites,
                    'knowledge',
                    course_section_topics.knowledge,
                    'flow',
                    course_section_topics.flow,
                    'quiz',
                    course_section_topics.quiz,
                    'completion_criteria',
                    course_section_topics.completion_criteria
                )
                ORDER BY
                    course_section_topics."index" ASC
            ) AS topics
        FROM
            course_sections
            JOIN course_section_topics USING (course_section_id)
        GROUP BY
            course_sections.course_id,
            course_sections.course_section_id
    ) AS sections USING (course_id)
WHERE
    courses.course_id = @CourseId :: uuid
GROUP BY
    courses.course_id,
    courses.title,
    courses.description,
    courses.slug,
    courses.tags,
    courses.publish_status,
    courses.category_id,
    categories.name,
    courses.published_at,
    courses.author_id,
    authors.name,
    courses.visibility;

-- name: GetProgressByUserIdAndCourseId :many
SELECT
    user_topic_progress_id,
    utp.course_id,
    utp.course_section_id,
    utp.course_section_topic_id,
    user_id,
    status,
    cs."index" AS section_index,
    cst."index" AS topic_index
FROM
    user_topic_progresses utp
    JOIN course_sections cs ON utp.course_section_id = cs.course_section_id
    JOIN course_section_topics cst ON utp.course_section_topic_id = cst.course_section_topic_id
WHERE
    user_id = @UserId :: uuid
    AND utp.course_id = @CourseId :: uuid;

-- name: UpsertProgress :exec
INSERT INTO
    user_topic_progresses (
        user_topic_progress_id,
        course_id,
        course_section_id,
        course_section_topic_id,
        user_id,
        status
    )
VALUES
    (
        @UserTopicProgressId :: uuid,
        @CourseId :: uuid,
        @CourseSectionId :: uuid,
        @CourseSectionTopicId :: uuid,
        @UserId :: uuid,
        @Status
    )
ON CONFLICT (course_section_topic_id, user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
    status = EXCLUDED.status;

    CONSTRAINT fk_apikeys_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)

    course_id UUID NOT NULL,
    index SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    _created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    _updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),

    CONSTRAINT fk_course_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(course_id),
    CONSTRAINT uq_course_sections_course_id_index UNIQUE (course_id, index) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_sections_course_id ON course_sections USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_course_sections_meta_updated_at BEFORE
UPDATE
    ON course_sections FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

CREATE INDEX idx_course_section_topics_course_id ON course_section_topics USING BTREE (course_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_course_section_topics_course_section_id ON course_section_topics USING BTREE (course_section_id);

UPDATE
    ON course_section_topics FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

    CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_topic_id FOREIGN KEY (course_section_topic_id) REFERENCES course_section_topics(course_section_topic_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_user_id FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id)
);

UPDATE
    ON user_topic_progresses FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_meta_updated_at();

# Plan: user_topic_progresses のスキーマ簡素化

## Context

`user_topic_progresses` テーブルは現在、クエリ効率のために `course_id` と `course_section_id` を非正規化して保持しているが、これらは `course_section_topics` → `course_sections` → `courses` のJOINで取得可能。また `user_topic_progress_id` (サロゲートPK) も不要と判断。

PKを元の複合キー `(course_section_topic_id, user_id)` に戻し、余分なカラムを削除してスキーマを簡素化する。

---

## 変更ファイル一覧

1. `apps/api/migrations/000003_course_complement.up.sql`
2. `apps/api/queries/courses.sql`
3. `apps/api/internal/db/courses.sql.go`（sqlc 生成ファイル、手動更新）
4. `apps/api/internal/db/models.go`（sqlc 生成ファイル、手動更新）
5. `apps/api/routes/courses/commands/course.entity.go`
6. `apps/api/routes/courses/commands/user_topic_progress.sqrc-repository.go`

---

## 詳細変更内容

### 1. `000003_course_complement.up.sql`

user_topic_progresses に関する以下の処理を **削除**:
- `user_topic_progress_id` カラム追加
- PK を `user_topic_progress_id` に変更
- UNIQUE制約 `(course_section_topic_id, user_id)` 追加

代わりに以下を **追加**（`course_id`・`course_section_id` の削除）:
```sql
ALTER TABLE user_topic_progresses DROP CONSTRAINT fk_course_id;
ALTER TABLE user_topic_progresses DROP CONSTRAINT fk_course_section_id;
DROP INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_id;
DROP INDEX idx_user_topic_progresses_course_section_id;
ALTER TABLE user_topic_progresses DROP COLUMN course_id;
ALTER TABLE user_topic_progresses DROP COLUMN course_section_id;
```

### 2. `queries/courses.sql`

#### `GetProgressByUserIdAndCourseId`
- SELECT から `user_topic_progress_id`、`utp.course_id`、`utp.course_section_id` を削除
- JOIN を `course_section_topics cst` 経由に変更（utp.course_section_id → cst.course_section_id）
- WHERE 条件の `utp.course_id` を `cst.course_id` に変更

```sql
SELECT
    utp.course_section_topic_id,
    utp.user_id,
    utp.status,
    cs."index" AS section_index,
    cst."index" AS topic_index
FROM
    user_topic_progresses utp
    JOIN course_section_topics cst ON utp.course_section_topic_id = cst.course_section_topic_id
    JOIN course_sections cs ON cst.course_section_id = cs.course_section_id
WHERE
    utp.user_id = @UserId :: uuid
    AND cst.course_id = @CourseId :: uuid;
```

#### `UpsertProgress`
- `user_topic_progress_id`、`course_id`、`course_section_id` を削除
- INSERT カラム・VALUES を `course_section_topic_id`, `user_id`, `status` のみに

### 3. `internal/db/courses.sql.go`

- `GetProgressByUserIdAndCourseIdRow` から `UserTopicProgressID`、`CourseID`、`CourseSectionID` を削除、Scan 修正
- `UpsertProgressParams` から `Usertopicprogressid`、`Courseid`、`Coursesectionid` を削除、Exec 修正
- SQL 定数文字列も上記クエリに合わせて更新

### 4. `internal/db/models.go`

`UserTopicProgress` struct から以下を削除:
- `CourseID`
- `CourseSectionID`
- `UserTopicProgressID`

### 5. `course.entity.go`

`ProgressRecord` struct から以下を削除:
- `userTopicProgressId`
- `courseSectionId`

`Progress.start()` を修正:
- 重複チェックを `courseSectionTopicId == topic.topicId` のみに変更（`courseSectionId` チェックを削除）
- `ProgressRecord` 生成時に `courseSectionId` フィールドを削除

### 6. `user_topic_progress.sqrc-repository.go`

`getProgress()`:
- `ProgressRecord` から `userTopicProgressId`、`courseSectionId` フィールドの設定を削除

`save()`:
- `userTopicProgressId` 生成ロジックを削除
- `courseIdUuid`、`sectionIdUuid` の UUID 変換を削除
- `UpsertProgressParams` を `Coursesectiontopicid`、`Userid`、`Status` のみに変更

`generateUUID()` 関数を削除（不要になる）

---

## Verification

```bash
cd apps/api
go build ./...
go test ./routes/courses/commands/...
```
